name: fluid-particles
title: Fluid Particles
author: Toby Belhome
description: The Geometric Background component features a modern and sophisticated design, incorporating dynamic geometric shapes like triangles, squares, and polygons. These shapes subtly animate across the screen, adding a unique and engaging element to your website's background. Perfect for tech, creative, and professional websites, the geometric pattern adapts effortlessly to both light and dark themes, creating a sleek and visually striking experience for users.
